purpose: Demote cyclic finite-sum, Lean formalization, and periodic-boundary arXiv metadata into source leads only after adding a finite cyclic-sum Lean replay rung.

classifications.reason: Human-AI collaborative Lean formalization environment lead.
Lean Copilot; agent-assisted theorem proving lead.
Dafny compositional formal verification; adjacent proof-method lead.
Formal verification defenses; adjacent proof-systems lead.
Refinement types and formal verification lead.
Lean formalization of De Giorgi-Nash-Moser theory; source-body review required.
Periodic boundary conditions in a stochastic PDE context; source-body review required.
Periodic boundary condition physics lead; source-body review required.

boundaries: This gate classifies arXiv metadata only.
It does not establish paper truth, source-body review, latest literature coverage, or exhaustive literature coverage.
It does not promote any PDE result, theorem-prover result, or grand-problem claim.
No row is used as proof of the cyclic finite-sum theorem; the Lean replay receipt is the proof artifact for that bounded theorem.
